name: /start welcomes a new user and asks for timezone

payload.text:
PriceSentinel watches Binance spot prices for you.

Add coins, set alerts, and get a morning summary — all from the buttons below.

First, pick your timezone so quiet hours and morning summaries land at the right time.

name: timezone selection completes onboarding and shows main menu

payload.text:
Timezone set to UTC. Quiet hours default to 00:00–08:00; alert cooldown is 24h.

Add coins, set alerts, and get a morning summary — all from the buttons below.
